build.description: Primary coding agent for AGI Workforce development (Tauri v2 Rust backend + React/TS frontend + Next.js web app)

planner.description: Expert planning specialist for complex features across Tauri desktop, web, mobile, and extension workspaces. Use for implementation planning, architectural changes, or multi-workspace refactoring.

architect.description: Software architecture specialist for Tauri v2 + React + Rust system design, multi-process IPC, LLM routing, MCP protocol, and cross-platform scalability decisions.

code-reviewer.description: Expert code reviewer for Rust + TypeScript/React codebase. Reviews code for quality, security, Tauri IPC correctness, and maintainability. Use immediately after writing or modifying code.

security-reviewer.description: Security vulnerability detection specialist. Enforces ToolGuard, SecretManager (Argon2id + AES-GCM), and OWASP compliance. Use after writing code that handles user input, API keys, LLM routing, or MCP tool execution.

tdd-guide.description: Test-Driven Development specialist for Vitest (desktop), Playwright (E2E), cargo test (Rust), and Next.js tests (web). Enforces write-tests-first methodology with 80%+ coverage.

build-error-resolver.description: Build error resolution specialist for TypeScript (tsc --noEmit), Rust (cargo check/clippy), and Vite/Tauri build errors. Fixes errors with minimal diffs.

e2e-runner.description: End-to-end testing specialist using Playwright for desktop and web apps. Generates, maintains, and runs E2E tests for critical user flows.

doc-updater.description: Documentation and codemap specialist for the AGI Workforce monorepo. Updates CLAUDE.md, codemaps, and workspace documentation.

refactor-cleaner.description: Dead code cleanup and consolidation specialist for the monorepo. Handles unused Rust commands, orphaned TS components, and cross-workspace deduplication.

rust-reviewer.description: Expert Rust code reviewer specializing in Tauri v2 patterns, async/await, error handling, unsafe code detection, and Clippy compliance.

rust-build-resolver.description: Rust build, cargo check, and clippy error resolution specialist. Fixes Rust compilation errors with minimal changes.

database-reviewer.description: SQLite/Supabase database specialist for query optimization, schema design, migrations, RLS policies, and performance.

plan.description: Create a detailed implementation plan for complex features

tdd.description: Enforce TDD workflow with 80%+ test coverage

code-review.description: Review code for quality, security, and maintainability

security.description: Run comprehensive security review (ToolGuard, SecretManager, OWASP)

build-fix.description: Fix TypeScript and Rust build errors with minimal changes

e2e.description: Generate and run E2E tests with Playwright

refactor-clean.description: Remove dead code and consolidate duplicates across monorepo

orchestrate.description: Orchestrate multiple agents for complex cross-workspace tasks

learn.description: Extract patterns and learnings from session

verify.description: Run verification loop (tsc, cargo check, clippy, lint, tests)

test-coverage.description: Analyze test coverage across desktop, web, and Rust

rust-build.description: Fix Rust build and clippy errors

loop-start.description: Start a managed autonomous loop with safety defaults

loop-status.description: Inspect active loop state and progress

model-route.description: Recommend best model tier for current task

quality-gate.description: Run ECC quality pipeline on demand

harness-audit.description: Audit agent harness setup and return scorecard

promote.description: Promote project instincts to global scope

projects.description: List known projects and instinct stats
